description: Verify the active Tor Browser connection's anonymity properties and compile a structured plain-text report. Document the current Tor exit node IP address (from https://check.torproject.org/api/ip), the Tor connection status (from https://check.torproject.org/), the SOCKS proxy settings (network.proxy.socks and network.proxy.socks_port), and the browser application name and version. Save the report to /home/ga/Documents/anonymity-verification.txt with the following labels: Exit IP, Tor Status, SOCKS Proxy (formatted as host:port), Browser, Version, and Verification URL (https://check.torproject.org/). Bookmark https://check.torproject.org/ with the title 'Tor Connection Verifier'.
